items.title: Version 1.1.2-early-access
items.summary: This update introduces a dedicated checks service and a pre-boot environment for VFS clearing, which now triggers a system reboot. Additionally, it streamlines the system by removing demo sprites and phasing out vfs wipe and configuration commands in favor of standard VFS operations.
items.content_html:
This update introduces a dedicated checks service and a pre-boot environment for VFS clearing, which now triggers a system reboot. Additionally, it streamlines the system by removing demo sprites and phasing out vfs wipe and configuration commands in favor of standard VFS operations.

Adds:

  • checks, the service & VFS checking service.
  • A new pre-boot environment specifically for VFS clearing.

Changes:

  • Removed the built-in “What can Kamix do?” demo sprites if they existed.
  • vfs clear now reboots Kamix to a pre-boot environment.

Removes:

  • vfs wipe as it is now unsafe.
  • kx set-config as it was superseded by vfs write.
  • kx list-config as it was superseded by vfs list.

items.title: Version 1.1.1-early-access
items.summary: This update focuses exclusively on a stability fix that prevents the entire system from hanging during certain vfss actions.
items.content_html:
This update focuses exclusively on a stability fix that prevents the entire system from hanging during certain vfss actions.

Adds:

(Nothing.)

Changes:

  • Fixed the bug where some vfss actions would hang the entire system.

Removes:

(Nothing.)

items.title: Version 1.1.0-early-access
items.summary: This update introduces the shellms manipulation service, the vfs rm command, and a /RAM/busy file to manage command concurrency. It also renames kamix to bootl, separates its commands into the new kamixcs service, and fixes a directory traversal bug in vfs list.
items.content_html:
This update introduces the shellms manipulation service, the vfs rm command, and a /RAM/busy file to manage command concurrency. It also renames kamix to bootl, separates its commands into the new kamixcs service, and fixes a directory traversal bug in vfs list.

Adds:

  • shellms, the shell manipulation service.
  • New file in RAM (/RAM/busy) that enables or disables new commands from running if a command is already in progress.
  • Finalized vfss command: vfs rm [path].

Changes:

  • Renamed kamix to bootl.
  • Split Kamix commands into a separate service from bootl, named kamixcs.
  • Fixed the bug where vfs list [path] would misinterpret files as directories if your working directory is not / (root).

Removes:

(Nothing.)

items.title: Version 1.0.0-early-access
items.summary:
Kamix, version 1.0.0 is officially out! However, it’s an early-access build, so not everything is here and bugs may occur.

Since there are no changes to log (this is Kamix’s first post, after all), the usual “Added”, “Removed”, and “Changed” headers are not there.
items.content_html:
Kamix, version 1.0.0 is officially out! However, it’s an early-access build, so not everything is here and bugs may occur.

Since there are no changes to log (this is Kamix’s first post, after all), the usual “Added”, “Removed”, and “Changed” headers are not there.

If you want to download Kamix’s source code (.pmp) or try Kamix the intended way, click on their respective links.
